[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101010 4
1 0111101 5
2 0101111 5
3 1011011 5
4 0000111 3
5 1100101 4
6 0010000 1
7 1011000 3

56 65 1110100 4
67 76 1011100 4
70 07 1100010 3
